runs.summary:
📋 Weekly Review Digest

Issues Found
- crypto-trading — Daily runs halted; overseer-status.json stale ~6.4 days (no runs since 2026-07-07, failing silently). #34

Top Enhancement Ideas (ranked)
1. overseer — Per-project freshness SLA + staleness alerts in digest (effort: low, impact: high): the crypto feed sat 153h stale while overseer stayed quiet — surface silent staleness at top of digest. (Directly prevents repeats of issue #34.)
2. crypto-trading — Signal reject-funnel report from existing thresholds (effort: low, impact: high): 10 signals evaluated, 0 acted — show the binding constraint to tell mis-tuned from structurally idle.
3. ufc-dashboard — Detect fighter-swap/bout-replacement to suppress phantom alerts (effort: medium, impact: high): impossible magnitudes (983, -245) are substitutions diffed as odds moves — restore alert trust.
4. coachvision — Per-technique coaching feedback w/ confidence scores (effort: medium, impact: high): segmentation works but nothing consumes it — build the layer that gives users a reason to upload clips.
5. ufc-dashboard — Rank/badge alerts by main-event weight + time-to-event (effort: low, impact: medium): main events are buried under raw magnitude.
6. crypto-trading — Buy-and-hold benchmark + rolling alpha on equity curve (effort: low, impact: medium): scalars already exist (-10.7% alpha) — make underperformance visually obvious.

Weekly Digest

Issues Found
- Overseer — CONFIRMED: total GitHub API auth failure. Every tool (all reads, search, file_issue) returns 401 "Bad credentials". Overseer is fully blind: can't read any of the 3 projects, can't check its own health, can't dedupe or file issues. Root cause: dead/expired/misconfigured GitHub token shared by all tools.
- ⚠️ Self-file failed — the write path is broken by the same 401, so this ticket could NOT be auto-created. Manual action needed: rotate the overseer's GitHub PAT and verify scopes (repo read on all 4 repos + issues write).
- crypto-trading / coachvision / ufc-dashboard — no project bugs confirmed; all data reads were blocked by the same 401, so nothing could be verified this cycle.

Top Enhancement Ideas (ranked)
1. Overseer — Startup auth health-check (effort: low, impact: high): validate the GitHub credential at startup and fail loudly / alert on a dead token, instead of silently blinding every review and project check like it did this week.
